name: wem-plugins
description: Local marketplace for in-house Claude Code plugins (dev iteration).

plugins.name: agentflow
plugins.description: Tech-stack-agnostic dev workflow for a single GitHub repo: a PO/DEV/QC agent team coordinated via GitHub issues + flow:* labels and a required GitHub Projects v2 board, with parallel /start terminals that claim work via issue assignee. Ships 4 core skills (setup-agentflow, project-board-protocol, git-flow-working, figma-design) and lets each project add role-prefixed skills (dev-*, qc-*, po-*). Fully specified connections (token + MCP server) for GitHub, GitHub Projects, and Figma, secure .env secret management, and a single-source-of-truth config describing dynamic project surfaces (any mix of backend/frontend/mobile/…).
